description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly blue in color, with a robust rectangular structure and a slightly angled front face. The front features a large display screen with the game title 'DUCK HUNT' in bold white and yellow letters, surrounded by a blue bezel. Below the screen is a control panel equipped with two mounted light gun controllers, each attached by a cord, and several buttons for gameplay. The lower section of the cabinet houses a coin slot and access panel, while the top is adorned with a marquee area displaying simple geometric designs. The side panels are plain blue with no visible graphics or decals, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, heavy construction typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A blue upright arcade game cabinet with a 'DUCK HUNT' screen, dual light gun controllers, and a coin slot, featuring a plain, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's solid blue panel, angled front, and protruding control panel with visible gun controllers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'DUCK HUNT' screen, dual light gun controllers, control buttons, coin slot, and marquee area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the blue side panel and the angled front profile of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain blue back panel with a black access panel at the bottom and no visible controls or graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat with a thick bezel, medium size, typical of vintage arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two mounted light gun controllers with cords, several round buttons, arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a simple blue and black color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, featuring simple geometric designs in white and blue, with no elaborate artwork or game-specific imagery.
